steps.title: Identify the defining clue
steps.content: The passage describes the excavation as involving “hard, physically tiring work” that lasts “weeks or even months.”

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs an adjective meaning hard or laborious — the passage describes the excavation as taking weeks or months of physically tiring work. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — cheap: inexpensive; the passage is about labor effort, not cost. ✗
  • Choice B — rapid: fast; but the passage explicitly says it takes weeks or months — the opposite of rapid. ✗
  • Choice C — common: ordinary or frequent; the passage describes how hard the process is, not how often it happens. ✗
  • Choice D — difficult: hard to do; directly captures weeks of hard, physically tiring work. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
